title: [CI] : linux machine aarch64 test take more longer compare to x86_64
body:
```The x86_64 test needs only 25 minutes so I am confused why aarch64 got so much slower, they used to be around the same time. Of course our tests should not take that long so we really need to figure out what is actually causing this slow down.```  
from issue [28299](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/28299
)

I think better to investigate what is causing the slowdown, 60 mins tests could be less idea.

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
